title: asclepias subviridis
intro: Asclepias subviridis, also known as Green Antelopehorn, is a species of milkweed native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Asclepias subviridis include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource for herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Asclepias subviridis typically involve making teas, tinctures, or salves from its roots and leaves, which are rich in bioactive compounds.
